title: LAW n. 26 of 5 May 1979 Publication of administrative and regulatory acts We the Captains Regent of the Most Serene Republic of San Marino
text:
LAW n. 26 of 5 May 1979 

Publication of administrative and regulatory acts 
 
We the Captains Regent 
of the Most Serene Republic of San Marino 
 
Promulgate and make public this law, approved by the Great and General Council during its session of 5 
May 1979. 
 
Article 1 
 
The “Administrative Section” is hereby established within the “Official Bulletin”. In this Section, the 
abstracts of the following shall be published: 
 
a) administrative acts of the Congress of State entailing expenses and any other act of cons iderable public 
interest; 
 
b) regulatory acts passed by the Congress of State to implement laws; 
 
c) acts of the Congress of State concerning hiring and firing of public employees; 
 
d) administrative acts of the Great and General Council; 
 
e) administrative acts of Commissions implementing laws and entailing expenses. 
 
Article 2 
 
The creation of the “Administrative Section”, including the acts to be published, shall be a responsibility of 
the Minister of the Interior, who, to this end, shall be assisted by the Press Office and the Legal Office of the 
Ministries. 
 
Article 3 
 
The publication of acts in the “Administrative Section” shall not constitute a requirement for their 
enforcement, unless explicitly provided for by a specific law provision. 
 
Article 4 
 
The Bulletin is published on a monthly basis. 
 
The Presidents of the Commissions shall have the duty to submit to the Ministry of the Interior an integral 
copy of the minutes of their meetings within 5 days from the approval of the same. 
 
Article 5 
 
This Law shall enter into force on 1 July 1979. 

Done at Our Residence on 8 May 1979 – 1678 since the Foundation of the Republic. 
 
THE CAPTAINS REGENT 
Marino Bollini – Lino Celli 
 
THE MINISTER OF THE INTERIOR
